scripts.build: pnpm build:web && pnpm --filter @workframe/workframe-api build && pnpm --filter @workframe/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workframe/web build && pnpm --filter @workframe/workframe-api typecheck && pnpm --filter @workframe/desktop typecheck
scripts.test:ci: pnpm verify:version && pnpm verify:docs && pnpm verify:evidence && pnpm verify:public && pnpm --filter @workframe/workframe-api typecheck && pnpm build:web && node packages/create-workframe/scripts/sync-canonical-to-package.mjs && node packages/create-workframe/scripts/bundle-workframe-ui.mjs --skip-build && pnpm test:scaffold && node scripts/workframe/run-package-install-evidence.mjs --skip-prep && node scripts/workframe/run-negative-install-evidence.mjs
